title: Desert Villager Trader
description: Adds a Desert Trader, a new Structure, and a Grim Armor
body:
**This mod adds a new villager to the Desert.**

The Desert Villager Trader can only be found in his new pyramid, which spawns in desert biomes.

You can also summon him anywhere by placing his Traderblock Workstation (found in every pyramid structure) next to a jobless villager.
![pyramid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b26bcb7733fcdb4bc41d8b122285ddec2f92837e.jpeg)



Desert Villager Trader:

Buys and sells Desert-related items.
Sells a brand-new Grim Armor set for the player.
![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8eba4377cdd997215d2d0d68ca757406728b89b.jpeg)

Grim Armor:

Stats are between Iron and Diamond Armor.
Wearing the full set grants the player the Resistance effect.
Can be repaired with Bones.
![Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4b0edaa4baade9eea8f4cdd061bb9d08e9eea83.jpeg)


 

You are free to include this mod in your modpacks

Made by Leonxkingx
